ideation: This animation sequence will portray a water buffalo's characteristic slow, deliberate movements.  The animation will focus on a gentle head-lowering motion, which is often associated with grazing or a sense of calm.  Since our robot lacks the physical characteristics of a water buffalo (like a head and neck), we will simulate the head-lowering action by using the arms. Frame 1 will start with the arms in a neutral position. Frame 2 will show the arms moving downward slightly, mimicking the lowering of the head. Frame 3 will show the arms in a lower position, representing the head fully lowered. Finally, Frame 4 will show the arms returning to the neutral position to complete the cycle.

frames.beat: arms hang low, ready to graze
arms lower slightly, a gentle nod
arms fully lowered, head down to eat
arms return to neutral, looking up
